title: Forge unified finding (C2)
description: The single shape every check emits — whether parsed from a child validator's `LEVEL path:line message` line or emitted by a manager module. Owned by Bundle F (ADR-0004, BR-INT-006). See docs/manager/spec/SPEC-09-data-model.md §The unified finding (C2).

line.description: 1-based line the finding concerns, or null when not line-scoped.

source.description: Emitter — the child validator's filename or the manager module noun.
